MetaVolcanoR 1.0.1
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • MetaVolcanoR for proteomics: a pan-cancer meta-analysis of the CPTAC tumor proteome
    • MetaVolcanoR: Differential expression meta-analysis tool
    • MetaVolcanoR: Updated Features and Enrichment Analysis
    • UNKNOWN TITLE

Reference

All functions

calc_vi()

A function to calculate variance from confidence interval limits

collapse_deg()

A function to filter out geneIDs standing for the same gene name

combining_mv()

A function to draw the 'Combining meta-analysis' MetaVolcano

cum_freq_data()

A data formating function for inverse-cummulative DEG distribution

deg_def()

A DEG definition function

diffexplist

Differential expression results from five studies

draw_cum_freq()

A function to visualize the inverse-cummulative DEG distribution

draw_featurebar()

A function for feature barplot visualization

draw_forest()

A function to draw a forest plot from the REM MetaVolcano result

enrichment_mv()

Run gene set enrichment analysis on MetaVolcano results

MetaVolcano-class

MetaVolcano S4 Class

plot_mv()

A MetaVolcano ploting function

plot_rem()

A function to plot the Random Effect Model (REM) MetaVolcano

prepare_deseq2()

Prepare DESeq2 results for MetaVolcanoR

prepare_edger()

Prepare edgeR results for MetaVolcanoR

prepare_limma()

Prepare limma results for MetaVolcanoR

prepare_swish()

Prepare Swish/fishpond transcript-level results for MetaVolcanoR

remodel()

A function to model foldchange variance along several studies This function calculate the REM-summary fold-change

rem_mv()

Random Effect Model (REM) MetaVolcano

rename_col()

A column renaming function merged inputs

set_degbar_data()

A function setting data format for DEG barplot visualization

vaccine_proteomics

Plasma proteomic response to influenza vaccination (five cohorts)

votecount_mv()

A function to draw the 'Vote-counting meta-analysis' MetaVolcano

Contents
